name: Tandy - Dagger
description:
Tandy had thought this would be an easier mission as she was just sent to guard a small house but that all went very wrong when a villain showed up. Throughout the fight she felt her and Cloak couldn't do any damage. Then she was hit by something and fell unconscious. Now waking up she can barely see but hopes the figure she sees is a good guy.

Saw a bunch of Luna Snow or Squirrel girl Bots but no Dagger, so I needed to change that. Plus she's sexy asf so... yeah.

Extra info: I left a lot of this bots scenario up to the user. So you should be able to decide if she was transported to a new world, you save her, or you are cloak. If you are cloak though probably best to state that in the beginning message.

Edit: Changed bot image since before I couldn't find a pic I liked but now I did so... yeah.

Leave any bots you want made in the comments and I'll try to do them. Make sure to try and leave the scenario + type of girl you want.

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message.
creator: ExoTTG
